claim_limit: scalar pose-count collision screening only; not full robot planning, kinematics, CCD, or witness-row output
comparable_metric_scope: prepared scalar colliding-pose count for the same poses, edges, obstacles, and iteration policy
notes: CPU oracle uses direct pose-flag aggregation during any-hit traversal and compact pose-count postprocess.
CPU oracle worker_count=8. On Linux, worker_count>1 uses exact process-level OR-reduction over disjoint ray chunks.
No separate backend scene prepare or pose-index prepare phase exists on the CPU oracle path.

validation.method: oracle path by construction using exact CPU pose-flag traversal
